value.found_quote: **Graph-based workflows:** (ADK 2.0 and higher) This workflow type allows you to compose both AI-powered agents and deterministic execution nodes into a flexible execution graph that can include decision branching.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Graph-based workflows" as an offering under ADK (Google's Agent Development Kit), matching the claim almost verbatim: it composes AI-powered agents and deterministic execution nodes into a flexible execution graph with decision branching. The feature is listed as available in ADK 2.0 and higher, indicating general availability (active status).
